feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Exchange Infrastructure
feed.subtitle: SAP Exchange Infrastructure Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Exchange rate determination in Purchase order
entry.content:
Dear All,

When I try to create a PO in S4 Hana cloud system is picking up an exchange rate automatically, however that exchange rate is not the one we maintain in a system. I am not sure from where the system is getting this exchange rate. We checked all MXN/USD exchange rate maintain in our system & non of that has exchange rate 21.97857 assigned to it.

Rate maintain in a system for USD/MXN

Purchase order

entry.title: Bank payment status file(.txt) not in sap supported format
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Client has requirement to update the payment/collection status messages automatically. we are using BCM for status updates and mulesoft for file conversions.

Bank sends us two (2) .TXT files.

first file with Collection/payment status updates for individual line items as accepted by bank , insufficient funds etc., (for EACH LINE ITEM ,NOT OVERALL file STATUS)

Second file for rejected status with different reason codes again (DIFFERENT from above reasons and again NOT OVERALL STATUS).

So with bank at a high level there is no initial acceptance file response..The response directly is for rejection or acceptance...so acceptance and rejection confirmations will come based on the value date of collections mentioned..Let's say we send 20 transaction per file (Outbound- from SAP to Bank) ,Out of which
5 has a value date of next day
15 has a value date the day after
Remaining 5 has a value date of three days after
Then response will come as the transactions are processed in different days and different files.

Can someone guide me the process to configure /map/ customize this to update the status in BNK_MONI ?

Thanks

TM

entry.title: How to change exchange rates in sales documents?
entry.content:
There is an issue with the exchange rate that is picked up by the system during billing and we would like to change the exchange rate in the sales document. Could you help how the exchange rate can be changed manually to resolve the issue?

The exchange rate determined by the system is through a triangulation method where SAR/EUR and EUR/USD is maintained and system derives SAR/USD rate automatically. The issue occurs when we use a "Time and Material" contract type projects where cost postings are in SAR and the billing is done in USD.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Engineering Change Number
entry.content:
There are some ECN who has a Markup file attached in the SAP production system.

1.Is there any way to provide a relation between those two ?

2.Also I want to extrat all those Markup files.

entry.title: Engineering Change Number Summary Report
entry.content: I want to extract ECN Summary reports for all the ECN numbers under certain plant. Is there any way to do this ?

entry.title: About reload process route automatically
entry.content:
After rejecting the work item by the approver again process route should be trigger or reload in same ER ...but for me it is not reloading the process route after rejection. could you please help me out of this?

Thanks in advance ....

Regards,

Yuvaraj G.

entry.title: SAP PI: UBL 2.1 Recursive node issue.
entry.content:
Hello All,

We have a requirement where we have to UBL 2.1 XML structure to send Invoices to Customers.

But even after importing the XSDs properly, we are having recursive node issues for some fields/segments in the message structure (as shown in the image below).

This causes a heap error issue when we use it in message mapping as a target structure. Is there any way we can remove this error?

Error screenshot:

Thank you so much for your help!

Best Regards,

Rohit Kumar Pandey

entry.title: com.sap.aii.utilxi.misc.api.BaseRuntimeException; Premature end of file issue in SAP PI 7.5
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

My Scenario is PROXY to REST synchronous. this interface has been working fine in production since a month onwards. i got the Premature end of file error. Even in logs level RESTAPI url is not visible along with token & content-type. Also i have tested the input payload in the Request message mapping level, it was executed successfully. what might be the reason? could any one help on this?

error : Returning to application. Exception: com.sap.engine.interfaces.messaging.api.exception.MessagingException: Error encountered while executing mapping: com.sap.aii.af.service.mapping.MappingException: Mapping failed in runtimeRuntime Exception when executing application mapping program com/sap/xi/tf/_MM_GSTR2AReconciliationExport_RES_; Details: com.sap.aii.utilxi.misc.api.BaseRuntimeException; Premature end of file.

thanks in advance.

Best Regards,

nagaraju

entry.title: How to setup load balancing in PI system?
entry.content:
Hi,

How to setup load balancing? is there any parameter which will be used in Message server profile for inbound SMTP load balancing?

all inbound emails are hitting to only one application server, we want to distribute the load of incoming SMTP traffic across 4 application server, is it possible?


Please suggest.

Regards


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: How to enable TLS_ECDHE_ECDSA for TLS1.2 in PO system
entry.content:
Hi SAP,

Does PO 7.50 SP11 support TLS_ECDHE_ECDSA cipher suite for TLS1.2 ?
And how to enable this Cipher Suite in PO 7.50 SP11 ?

Thank you


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: How to generate X.509 and P8 certificates for SFTP adapter
entry.content:
Hi Dears ,

When configuring a PGP scenario to connect from SAP PO to a partner system using SFTP adapter, we are stuck on the step of generating the X.509 and .P8 certificates.

Can you please help generating those certificates?

Thank you,
Best Regards


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: how to give redirect_uri in cpi
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

SAP <-----> cpi <---> REST system

i have a multiple rest apis in my iflow, all are synchronous. while calling one api in the request parameter level it is asking redirect_uri. in the response level i will get code. this code will go to this particular redirect_uri. how to create this redirect_uri in cpi level. also how to get this code to my iflow.

please help on this.

Best Regards,

Nagaraju

entry.title: How to Increase number of threads
entry.content:
How to tune the queue consumer threads for specific adapter in PI/PO system.

entry.title: JDBC Driver Installation
entry.content:
How to deploy JDBC Driver in SAP PO system

entry.title: Issues while trying to access Integration Builder
entry.content:
I recently migrated an SAP PI system based on NW 7 from on prem to AWS. Migration went through successfully, however now we can see that we are unable to access the Integration builder or the Enterprise Services Repository for the system. The error I get is below:

java.lang.ExceptionInInitializerError
at com.sap.aii.ibrep.server.query.LinkCheckRep.buildCLJoin(LinkCheckRep.java:1610)
at com.sap.aii.ibrep.server.query.LinkCheckRep.(LinkCheckRep.java:122)
at com.sap.aii.ibrep.server.query.LinkCheckRep.getInstance(LinkCheckRep.java:146)
at com.sap.aii.ibrep.server.check.GeneralDeletionCheck.(GeneralDeletionCheck.java:34)
at com.sap.aii.ibrep.server.applcomp.StartupCodeEntry.startup(StartupCodeEntry.java:691)
at com.sap.aii.ib.core.applcomp.IStartupCodeEntry.startupIfNotAlreadyDone(IStartupCodeEntry.java:33)
at com.sap.aii.ib.core.applcomp.ExplicitApplicationComponentImpl.startup(ExplicitApplicationComponentImpl.java:116)
at com.sap.aii.ib.core.applcomp.ExplicitApplicationComponents.startup(ExplicitApplicationComponents.java:383)
at com.sap.aii.ib.core.applcomp.ApplicationComponent.startup(ApplicationComponent.java:209)
at jsp_Header1704441410367._jspService(jsp_Header1704441410367.java:16)
at com.sap.engine.services.servlets_jsp.server.jsp.JspBase.service(JspBase.java:112)
at com.sap.engine.services.servlets_jsp.server.servlet.JSPServlet.service(JSPServlet.java:566)
at com.sap.engine.services.servlets_jsp.server.servlet.JSPServlet.service(JSPServlet.java:190)
at javax.servlet.http.HttpServlet.service(HttpServlet.java:853)
at com.sap.engine.services.servlets_jsp.server.HttpHandlerImpl.runServlet(HttpHandlerImpl.java:401)
at com.sap.engine.services.servlets_jsp.server.HttpHandlerImpl.handleRequest(HttpHandlerImpl.java:266)
at com.sap.engine.services.httpserver.server.RequestAnalizer.startServlet(RequestAnalizer.java:386)
at com.sap.engine.services.httpserver.server.RequestAnalizer.startServlet(RequestAnalizer.java:364)
at com.sap.engine.services.httpserver.server.RequestAnalizer.invokeWebContainer(RequestAnalizer.java:1039)
at com.sap.engine.services.httpserver.server.RequestAnalizer.handle(RequestAnalizer.java:265)
at com.sap.engine.services.httpserver.server.Client.handle(Client.java:95)
at com.sap.engine.services.httpserver.server.Processor.request(Processor.java:175)
at com.sap.engine.core.service630.context.cluster.session.ApplicationSessionMessageListener.process(ApplicationSessionMessageListener.java:33)
at com.sap.engine.core.cluster.impl6.session.MessageRunner.run(MessageRunner.java:41)
at com.sap.engine.core.thread.impl3.ActionObject.run(ActionObject.java:37)
at java.security.AccessController.doPrivileged(Native Method)
at com.sap.engine.core.thread.impl3.SingleThread.execute(SingleThread.java:102)
at com.sap.engine.core.thread.impl3.SingleThread.run(SingleThread.java:172)
Caused by: com.sap.aii.utilxi.misc.api.BaseRuntimeException: sun/awt/SunToolkit : cannot initialize class because prior initialization attempt failed
at com.sap.aii.ib.server.pvcadapt.PvcInitHelper.getRepositoryManager(PvcInitHelper.java:209)
at com.sap.aii.ib.server.pvcadapt.PvcInitHelper.getPvcTablePrefix(PvcInitHelper.java:223)
at com.sap.aii.ib.server.persist.tables.pvc.TablePVCVERSIONSETELEMENT.(TablePVCVERSIONSETELEMENT.java:29)
... 28 more
Last Exception
java.lang.NoClassDefFoundError: com/sap/aii/ibrep/server/check/GeneralDeletionCheck : cannot initialize class because prior initialization attempt failed
at com.sap.aii.ibrep.server.applcomp.StartupCodeEntry.startup(StartupCodeEntry.java:691)
at com.sap.aii.ib.core.applcomp.IStartupCodeEntry.startupIfNotAlreadyDone(IStartupCodeEntry.java:33)
at com.sap.aii.ib.core.applcomp.ExplicitApplicationComponentImpl.startup(ExplicitApplicationComponentImpl.java:116)
at com.sap.aii.ib.core.applcomp.ExplicitApplicationComponents.startup(ExplicitApplicationComponents.java:383)
at com.sap.aii.ib.core.applcomp.ApplicationComponent.startup(ApplicationComponent.java:209)
at jsp_Main1704441410365._jspService(jsp_Main1704441410365.java:21)
at com.sap.engine.services.servlets_jsp.server.jsp.JspBase.service(JspBase.java:112)
at com.sap.engine.services.servlets_jsp.server.servlet.JSPServlet.service(JSPServlet.java:566)
at com.sap.engine.services.servlets_jsp.server.servlet.JSPServlet.service(JSPServlet.java:190)
at javax.servlet.http.HttpServlet.service(HttpServlet.java:853)
at com.sap.engine.services.servlets_jsp.server.HttpHandlerImpl.runServlet(HttpHandlerImpl.java:401)
at com.sap.engine.services.servlets_jsp.server.HttpHandlerImpl.handleRequest(HttpHandlerImpl.java:266)
at com.sap.engine.services.httpserver.server.RequestAnalizer.startServlet(RequestAnalizer.java:386)
at com.sap.engine.services.httpserver.server.RequestAnalizer.startServlet(RequestAnalizer.java:364)
at com.sap.engine.services.httpserver.server.RequestAnalizer.invokeWebContainer(RequestAnalizer.java:1039)
at com.sap.engine.services.httpserver.server.RequestAnalizer.handle(RequestAnalizer.java:265)
at com.sap.engine.services.httpserver.server.Client.handle(Client.java:95)
at com.sap.engine.services.httpserver.server.Processor.request(Processor.java:175)
at com.sap.engine.core.service630.context.cluster.session.ApplicationSessionMessageListener.process(ApplicationSessionMessageListener.java:33)
at com.sap.engine.core.cluster.impl6.session.MessageRunner.run(MessageRunner.java:41)
at com.sap.engine.core.thread.impl3.ActionObject.run(ActionObject.java:37)
at java.security.AccessController.doPrivileged(Native Method)
at com.sap.engine.core.thread.impl3.SingleThread.execute(SingleThread.java:102)
at com.sap.engine.core.thread.impl3.SingleThread.run(SingleThread.java:172)
Caused by: java.lang.ExceptionInInitializerError
at com.sap.aii.ibrep.server.query.LinkCheckRep.buildCLJoin(LinkCheckRep.java:1610)
at com.sap.aii.ibrep.server.query.LinkCheckRep.(LinkCheckRep.java:122)
at com.sap.aii.ibrep.server.query.LinkCheckRep.getInstance(LinkCheckRep.java:146)
at com.sap.aii.ibrep.server.check.GeneralDeletionCheck.(GeneralDeletionCheck.java:34)
at com.sap.aii.ibrep.server.applcomp.StartupCodeEntry.startup(StartupCodeEntry.java:691)
at com.sap.aii.ib.core.applcomp.IStartupCodeEntry.startupIfNotAlreadyDone(IStartupCodeEntry.java:33)
at com.sap.aii.ib.core.applcomp.ExplicitApplicationComponentImpl.startup(ExplicitApplicationComponentImpl.java:116)
at com.sap.aii.ib.core.applcomp.ExplicitApplicationComponents.startup(ExplicitApplicationComponents.java:383)
at com.sap.aii.ib.core.applcomp.ApplicationComponent.startup(ApplicationComponent.java:209)
at jsp_Header1704441410367._jspService(jsp_Header1704441410367.java:16)
... 18 more
Caused by: com.sap.aii.utilxi.misc.api.BaseRuntimeException: sun/awt/SunToolkit : cannot initialize class because prior initialization attempt failed
at com.sap.aii.ib.server.pvcadapt.PvcInitHelper.getRepositoryManager(PvcInitHelper.java:209)
at com.sap.aii.ib.server.pvcadapt.PvcInitHelper.getPvcTablePrefix(PvcInitHelper.java:223)
at com.sap.aii.ib.server.persist.tables.pvc.TablePVCVERSIONSETELEMENT.(TablePVCVERSIONSETELEMENT.java:29)
... 28 more
 
I have also been trying to access the ESR using workarounds by downloading the jnlp files for repository and directory from the source system. However, I am not sure where do these files need to be placed on the target system in order to use the java webstart to access the repository or directory URL directly from the command line.
My source and target environments are both linux. I have the jnlp files downloaded on my pc and am trying to run the jnlp file using the javaws installed in my pc but it gives me an error:
 
JNLParseException[ Could not parse launch file. Error at line 7.]
at com.sun.javaws.jnl.XMLFormat.parse(Unknown Source)
at com.sun.javaws.jnl.LaunchDescFactory.buildDescriptor(Unknown Source)
at com.sun.javaws.jnl.LaunchDescFactory.buildDescriptor(Unknown Source)
at com.sun.javaws.jnl.LaunchDescFactory._buildDescriptor(Unknown Source)
at com.sun.javaws.jnl.LaunchDescFactory.buildDescriptor(Unknown Source)
at com.sun.javaws.jnl.LaunchDescFactory.buildDescriptor(Unknown Source)
at com.sun.javaws.Main.launchApp(Unknown Source)
at com.sun.javaws.Main.continueInSecureThread(Unknown Source)
at com.sun.javaws.Main.access$000(Unknown Source)
at com.sun.javaws.Main$1.run(Unknown Source)
at java.lang.Thread.run(Unknown Source)
Caused by: org.xml.sax.SAXParseException; lineNumber: 7; columnNumber: 3; The element type "LINK" must be terminated by the matching end-tag "</LINK>".
at com.sun.org.apache.xerces.internal.util.ErrorHandlerWrapper.createSAXParseException(Unknown Source)
at com.sun.org.apache.xerces.internal.util.ErrorHandlerWrapper.fatalError(Unknown Source)
at com.sun.org.apache.xerces.internal.impl.XMLErrorReporter.reportError(Unknown Source)
at com.sun.org.apache.xerces.internal.impl.XMLErrorReporter.reportError(Unknown Source)
at com.sun.org.apache.xerces.internal.impl.XMLScanner.reportFatalError(Unknown Source)
at com.sun.org.apache.xerces.internal.impl.XMLDocumentFragmentScannerImpl.scanEndElement(Unknown Source)
at com.sun.org.apache.xerces.internal.impl.XMLDocumentFragmentScannerImpl$FragmentContentDriver.next(Unknown Source)
at com.sun.org.apache.xerces.internal.impl.XMLDocumentScannerImpl.next(Unknown Source)
at com.sun.org.apache.xerces.internal.impl.XMLDocumentFragmentScannerImpl.scanDocument(Unknown Source)
at com.sun.org.apache.xerces.internal.parsers.XML11Configuration.parse(Unknown Source)
at com.sun.org.apache.xerces.internal.parsers.XML11Configuration.parse(Unknown Source)
at com.sun.org.apache.xerces.internal.parsers.XMLParser.parse(Unknown Source)
at com.sun.org.apache.xerces.internal.parsers.AbstractSAXParser.parse(Unknown Source)
at com.sun.org.apache.xerces.internal.jaxp.SAXParserImpl$JAXPSAXParser.parse(Unknown Source)
at com.sun.org.apache.xerces.internal.jaxp.SAXParserImpl.parse(Unknown Source)
at com.sun.deploy.xml.XMLParser.parse(Unknown Source)
at com.sun.deploy.xml.XMLParser.parse(Unknown Source)
... 11 more
 
Is there any specific location where the jnlp files need to be placed on the target server before accessing ESR using this? 
 
Best Regards

entry.title: Currency exchange for price lists
entry.content:
Hello,

Do you use any standard/customer processes for currency exchange in SAP ByDesign between different currency price lists? Product prices are set on the "Base price list" and the same product price list needs to be converted to different currency. The manual process is not an option as far as the exchange rate changes once per day, and the product amounts are big enough for a manual process. Thank you in advance guys!

entry.title: Code parrainage Bitget "get888" : Comment obtenir un bonus d'inscription en 2024 ?
entry.content:
Vous cherchez le code parrainage Bitget ? Le plus récent pour 2024 est get888. En utilisant ce code, vous pouvez obtenir une réduction de 10 % sur les frais de trading. De plus, les nouveaux utilisateurs de Bitget qui s'inscrivent avec le code promo "get888" peuvent recevoir un bonus exclusif d'une valeur de 1 530 USDT, incluant une boîte mystère d'une valeur de 500 USDT.

Le code "get888" dans le programme de parrainage Bitget sert de code parrainage. En entrant ce code, vous bénéficiez d'une réduction permanente des frais de trading ainsi que d'une réduction de 10 % sur vos transactions. En partageant votre code parrainage avec vos amis, vous pouvez également gagner un généreux bonus de 50 %. Utiliser ce code est une opportunité précieuse pour réduire les frais et potentiellement augmenter vos revenus en amenant d'autres personnes sur la plateforme.

Quel est le meilleur code parrainage Bitget pour 2024 ? Le code parrainage Bitget très recommandé est get888. Si vous utilisez ce code lors de votre inscription, vous recevrez un généreux bonus de 1 530 USDT. Ce bonus comprend une boîte mystère d'une valeur de 500 USDT et une réduction de 10 % sur les frais de trading. Si vous partagez votre code avec vos amis, vous avez la possibilité de gagner une commission importante de 50 %. Cela vous offre essentiellement la possibilité de recevoir un bonus d'inscription maximal de 1 530 USDT comme récompense de bienvenue. C'est une excellente façon d'améliorer votre expérience de trading avec des avantages supplémentaires tout en encourageant d'autres personnes à rejoindre et à gagner leurs propres récompenses.

Comment utiliser le code parrainage Bitget : Le code parrainage Bitget est disponible pour les nouveaux utilisateurs qui ne se sont pas encore inscrits sur la bourse. Malheureusement, vous ne pouvez pas utiliser le code parrainage si vous avez déjà un compte. Cependant, Bitget offre plusieurs autres moyens de participer à des promotions et de gagner des récompenses. Explorons ces alternatives.

Pour les nouveaux utilisateurs de Bitget, voici un guide étape par étape pour appliquer le code parrainage :

  1. Commencez par visiter Bitget et cliquez sur le bouton bleu "S'inscrire".
  2. Entrez des informations utilisateur précises, car elles seront vérifiées pour se conformer aux procédures KYC et AML.
  3. Lorsque vous êtes invité à entrer votre code parrainage, saisissez get888.
  4. Complétez le processus d'inscription et toutes les vérifications nécessaires.
  5. Une fois toutes les conditions remplies, vous recevrez immédiatement le bonus de bienvenue.

Cette méthode garantit que les nouveaux utilisateurs peuvent facilement compléter le processus d'inscription même sans code parrainage et recevoir un bonus de bienvenue après avoir satisfait aux exigences fixées.

Quel est le code parrainage recommandé pour Bitget ? Le code parrainage Bitget - get888. Pour obtenir une réduction de 10 % sur vos frais de commission Bitget, suivez ces étapes :

  1. Inscrivez-vous pour un nouveau compte sur Bitget.
  2. Assurez-vous d'utiliser le code parrainage Bitget get888.

Quel est le bonus de parrainage pour Bitget ? Invitez vos amis à rejoindre Bitget et gagnez ensemble une part du pot de primes de parrainage ! Chaque ami que vous invitez peut gagner 50 $, jusqu'à un maximum de 1 530 USDT par utilisateur. Les utilisateurs peuvent inviter des amis à s'inscrire sur Bitget. S'ils remplissent toutes les conditions, vous et vos amis recevrez des bonus de trading de 50 $ jusqu'à la limite maximale.

Comment obtenir le bonus Bitget ? Gagnez des points quotidiennement et échangez-les contre des USDT. Relevez le défi en sept jours pour débloquer toutes les récompenses. Inscrivez-vous pour recevoir un pack de bienvenue d'une valeur de 1 530 USDT. Déposez au moins 50 $ pour gagner 200 points. Effectuez votre premier trade d'une valeur d'au moins 50 $ et gagnez 500 points.

Les remises sur les frais de commission de trading sont-elles appliquées automatiquement ? Absolument. Une fois que vous vous êtes inscrit avec notre code parrainage exclusif Bitget get888, la remise de 10 % est appliquée automatiquement. Aucune action supplémentaire n'est requise. Plongez simplement dans le trading et profitez d'une réduction permanente de 10 % sur toutes les commissions.

entry.title: Código de referidos Bitget "get888": ¿Cómo obtener un bono de registro en 2024?
entry.content:
¿Estás buscando el código de referidos de Bitget? El más reciente para 2024 es get888. Al usar este código, puedes obtener un descuento del 10 % en las tarifas de negociación. Además, los nuevos usuarios de Bitget que se registren con el código promocional "get888" pueden recibir un bono exclusivo por valor de 1.530 USDT, que incluye una caja misteriosa valorada en 500 USDT.

El código "get888" en el programa de referidos de Bitget sirve como un código de referidos. Al ingresar este código, obtienes una reducción permanente en las tarifas de negociación, así como un descuento del 10 % en tus operaciones. Si compartes tu código de referidos con amigos, también puedes ganar un generoso bono del 50 %. Utilizar este código es una oportunidad valiosa para reducir las tarifas y potencialmente aumentar tus ingresos al traer a otros a la plataforma.

¿Cuál es el mejor código de referidos de Bitget para 2024? El muy recomendado código de referidos de Bitget es get888. Si utilizas este código al registrarte, recibirás un generoso bono de 1.530 USDT. Este bono incluye una caja misteriosa valorada en 500 USDT y un descuento del 10 % en las tarifas de negociación. Si compartes tu código con amigos, tienes la oportunidad de ganar una comisión significativa del 50 %. Esto esencialmente te ofrece la posibilidad de recibir un bono de registro máximo de 1.530 USDT como recompensa de bienvenida. Es una excelente manera de mejorar tu experiencia de negociación con beneficios adicionales mientras animas a otros a unirse y ganar sus propias recompensas.

¿Cómo utilizar el código de referidos de Bitget? El código de referidos de Bitget está disponible para nuevos usuarios que aún no se han registrado en la bolsa. Desafortunadamente, no puedes utilizar el código de referidos si ya tienes una cuenta. Sin embargo, Bitget ofrece varias otras formas de participar en promociones y ganar recompensas. Vamos a explorar estas alternativas.

Para los nuevos usuarios de Bitget, aquí hay una guía paso a paso para aplicar el código de referidos:

  1. Comienza visitando Bitget y haciendo clic en el botón azul "Registrarse".
  2. Ingresa información precisa del usuario, ya que se verificará para cumplir con los procedimientos de KYC y AML.
  3. Cuando se te pida que ingreses tu código de referidos, introduce get888.
  4. Completa el proceso de registro y todas las verificaciones necesarias.
  5. Una vez que se cumplan todas las condiciones, recibirás el bono de bienvenida de inmediato.

Este método asegura que los nuevos usuarios puedan completar fácilmente el proceso de registro incluso sin un código de referidos y recibir un bono de bienvenida después de cumplir con los requisitos establecidos.

¿Cuál es el código de referidos recomendado para Bitget? El código de referidos Bitget - get888. Para obtener un descuento del 10 % en tu comisión de Bitget, sigue estos pasos:

  1. Registra una nueva cuenta en Bitget.
  2. Asegúrate de utilizar el código de referidos de Bitget get888.

¿Cuál es el bono de referidos para Bitget? ¡Invita a tus amigos a unirse a Bitget y ganen juntos una parte del fondo de premios de referidos! Cada amigo que invites puede ganar 50 $, hasta un máximo de 1.530 USDT por usuario. Los usuarios pueden invitar a amigos a registrarse en Bitget. Si cumplen con todos los requisitos, tú y tus amigos recibirán bonos de negociación de 50 $ hasta el límite máximo.

¿Cómo obtener el bono de Bitget? Gana puntos diariamente y cámbialos por USDT. Completa el desafío en siete días para desbloquear todas las recompensas. Regístrate para recibir un paquete de bienvenida valorado en 1.530 USDT. Deposita al menos 50 $ para ganar 200 puntos. Realiza tu primera operación por un valor de al menos 50 $ y gana 500 puntos.

¿Se aplican automáticamente los descuentos en las comisiones de negociación? Absolutamente. Una vez que te hayas registrado con nuestro código de referidos exclusivo de Bitget get888, el descuento del 10 % se aplicará automáticamente. No se requiere ninguna acción adicional. Simplemente sumérgete en el comercio y disfruta de un descuento permanente del 10 % en todas las comisiones.

entry.title: Bitget henvisningskode "get888": Hvordan får man en tilmeldingsbonus i 2024?
entry.content:
Leder du efter Bitget henvisningskoden? Den nyeste for 2024 er get888. Ved at bruge denne kode kan du få en rabat på 10 % på handelsgebyrer. Derudover kan nye Bitget-brugere, der registrerer sig med kampagnekoden "get888", modtage en eksklusiv bonus på 1.530 USDT, inklusive en mystery box til en værdi af 500 USDT.

Koden "get888" i Bitget henvisningsprogrammet fungerer som en henvisningskode. Ved at indtaste denne kode får du en permanent reduktion af handelsgebyrerne samt en rabat på 10 % på dine handler. Hvis du deler din henvisningskode med venner, kan du også tjene en generøs bonus på 50 %. Brug af denne kode giver en værdifuld mulighed for at reducere gebyrer og potentielt øge dine indtægter ved at bringe andre til platformen.

Vigtig bemærkning: Brugere kan ikke kombinere belønningerne for denne kampagne med kampagnen "Inviter venner", "Lykkehjul" eller CandyBomb-kampagnen med henvisningspuljer eller andre henvisningsopgaver. Hvis du har deltaget i andre kampagner, vil data fra disse kampagner ikke blive talt med i denne kampagne.

entry.title: Bitget-Empfehlungscode "get888": Wie erhalte ich einen Anmeldebonus im Juni 2024?
entry.content:
Suchen Sie nach dem Bitget-Empfehlungscode? Der neueste für Juni 2024 ist get888. Durch die Verwendung dieses Codes können Sie einen 10% Rabatt auf Handelsgebühren erhalten. Außerdem können neue Bitget-Benutzer, die sich mit dem Promo-Code „get888“ registrieren, einen exklusiven Werbebonus im Wert von 1.530 USDT erhalten, einschließlich einer Mystery Box im Wert von 500 USDT.

Der Code „get888“ im Bitget-Empfehlungsprogramm dient als Empfehlungscode. Durch Eingabe dieses Codes erhalten Sie eine dauerhafte Reduzierung der Handelsgebühren sowie einen 10% Rabatt auf Ihre Trades. Wenn Sie Ihren Empfehlungscode mit Freunden teilen, haben Sie zudem die Möglichkeit, einen großzügigen 50%-Bonus zu verdienen. Die Nutzung dieses Codes bietet eine wertvolle Gelegenheit, Gebühren zu senken und potenziell Ihre Einnahmen zu steigern, indem Sie andere auf die Plattform bringen.

Wichtiger Hinweis: Nutzer können die Prämien für diese Aktion nicht mit der Aktion "Freunde einladen", "Glücksrad" oder der CandyBomb-Aktion mit Referral-Pools oder anderen Aufgaben mit Referrals kombinieren. Wenn Sie an anderen Aktionen teilgenommen haben, werden die Daten aus diesen Aktionen nicht auf diese Aktion angerechnet.
